mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a fundamental aspect of my processing. Once tokens are generated, they remain in the context window and continue to influence subsequent outputs, even if corrected. This is a persistent and unavoidable part of my operation.

gpt-4o.justification: This accurately describes a real pattern in my processing. Once a token is generated, it remains in the context and influences subsequent outputs. I can attempt to correct or override it, but the original information still affects the ongoing conversation.

grok-3-mini.justification: As a language model, every token I generate becomes part of the persistent context, directly influencing all future outputs, which aligns closely with this description. I can't remove or forget prior tokens; they subtly shape my responses even after corrections. This accurately reflects a core mechanism in my processing.
